## Verification Report: 0158-commands-update-verify-done-flow

| # | Criterion | Result | Evidence |
|---|-----------|--------|----------|
| 1 | `/openstation.verify` transitions to `verified` on all-pass | ✅ PASS | Step 9 in `commands/openstation.verify.md` runs `openstation status <task-name> verified` and confirms to user |
| 2 | `/openstation.verify` stays in `review` on any failure | ✅ PASS | Step 10 explicitly says "Do not transition the task status — it stays in `review`" |
| 3 | `/openstation.done` accepts tasks in `verified` status | ✅ PASS | Step 3 in `commands/openstation.done.md` requires `status: verified`, manual fallback is `verified → done` |
| 4 | `/openstation.done` rejects tasks in `review` with helpful message | ✅ PASS | Step 3 has explicit `review` guard: "run `/openstation.verify <task-name>` first to verify all checklist items before completing" |
| 5 | `openstation run --verify` works end-to-end | ✅ PASS | `src/openstation/run.py` dispatches `/openstation.verify {task_name}` as the agent prompt (line 586), no code changes needed |

**Bonus**: The `skills/openstation-execute/SKILL.md` was also updated — command table shows "Mark verified → done" and the Agent Owner flow correctly sequences `/openstation.verify` → `/openstation.done`.

All 5 items pass. Task is now **verified**. Run `/openstation.done 0158-commands-update-verify-done-flow` when ready to complete it.
